allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add 6 keycap skill slots to bottom bar and halve resource bar widths

Bars now occupy ~15.5% width each \(left side\) with 6 keycap-style
skill hotbar slots filling the right ~45%. Increased font sizes for
bar labels \(13→16\) and level text \(20→22\) for legibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
